title: MurthyAudio: H1B Registration Process (Including Weighted Selection) - Murthy Law Firm | U.S Immigration Law
content:
## MurthyAudio: H1B Registration Process (Including Weighted Selection)
Tips for the upcoming H1B cap season and latest trends from the USCIS, including the weighted selection process, are discussed by Murthy Law Firm attorneys in the podcast recorded 29.Dec.2025. This was prepared and dropped early, due to the important topics here for U.S. employers.
The MP3 is available here and soon can be found in the archive of our podcasts and teleconferences on iTunes . Find more topics under the MurthyAudio tab on our homepage .
